title: Simple Sawmill
body:
# Simple Sawmill

This datapack solves the common irritation of just wanting to crfat wooden products faster.
It works on every single type of wood, and is actively updated when new wood is added!

# Crafting

Just put your wood into a stonecutter, and instantly make the product you need! This means you can strip wood, without having to place it down!

![Using the Sawmill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9418c744a28b8c706f8c2fd72fa028a2462a06cb.png)

Put your fresh planks in the stonecutter to make fences, gates, stairs, and slabs

![Crafting more wood products!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4b4e9d22c6cd69d6e318186d84ab771faac314c.png)

It also adds a use to Mangrove roots!

![Mangrove Roots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b598d8509f0733641fe2bbbe32fa83418665a25b.png)

# AutoCraft (ad)
This datapack was developed for the AutoCraft Server, and has been in use since!

[The AutoCraft SMP Community Discord](https://discord.gg/B4Set59eKb)
![AutoCraft Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/985243802471ff2a2ae0da3bd87ed71c711e5721_0.webp)
